hero.lede: All of QS Technology's technical documentation — product catalogues, operation and installation manuals for each controller model, servo & inverter documents, plus software & data updates. Click to download directly.

catalogue.label: Catalogue & profile
catalogue.heading: Catalogue & profile
catalogue.desc: The full catalogue covering every F-series and Astro-series controller line, plus the company profile. Vietnamese and English editions.

controllers.label: Controllers
controllers.heading: Controller documents
controllers.desc: Operation and installation manuals for each controller model: HMI operation, machining parameter setup, cabinet wiring diagrams, I/O configuration, and initial commissioning steps.

servo.label: Servo
servo.heading: Servo drive documents
servo.desc: User manuals, dimension drawings, software and certificates for the servo drive & motor lines. Original manufacturer documents, opened directly from source.

inverter.label: Inverter
inverter.heading: Inverter documents
inverter.desc: User manuals, dimension drawings, catalogues and certificates for the Sinus Penta and S-series inverter lines. Original manufacturer documents, opened directly from source.

software.label: Software & data
software.heading: Software & data
software.desc: The QSL Editor and QS Explorer tools for editing, backing up and loading controller data, plus the data-update package for the F54 model.

plc.heading: Advanced PLC documents
plc.body: Some special documents — detailed wiring diagrams, sample ladder source, advanced troubleshooting — are provided exclusively to customers with a technical-service contract.

macro.heading: Need another document?
macro.body: Need a specific document that isn't in the public library — EPLAN drawings, sample G-code, training videos? The QS technical team will email it within 24 hours.
